title: Canonical public operation vocabulary
description: The public contract uses the verbs Discover, Generate, Explain, Get, List, Retain, Restate, Delete, Status, Backup, Verify, and Restore with one documented meaning each. Save, Edit, Refresh, Alert, Notify, and arbitrary Execute are not synonyms. Every operation descriptor states mutability, authority, compatibility, limits, stable errors, and whether idempotency is required.
